# Country Horizon RV Park

> A quiet, 14-site RV park in Ripley, Oklahoma, at the intersection of
> Highway 33 and Highway 108 — about 7 miles from Cushing, OK, and a short
> drive from Stillwater and Perkins. Popular with pipeline and oil-field
> workers on monthly contracts, RV travelers, and Oklahoma State University
> (Stillwater) visitors.

## Facts

- Address: 9212 W Main St, Ripley, OK 74062
- Phone: 918-399-9423 (Sholie, primary)
- Alternate phone: 918-399-9154 (Jeff)
- Email: chrvpark@gmail.com
- Hours: 6:00 AM - 10:00 PM CST, daily
- Website: https://countryhorizonrvpark.com/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/CountryHorizonRVPark/
- 14 graveled RV sites, each 35 feet wide
- Full hookups: 30-amp and 50-amp electric, water (private well), sewer
- Free WiFi
- On-site trash dumpster
- Mailboxes available for long-term/monthly tenants
- Pets welcome on a leash
- Daily and monthly rate options (no fixed dollar amount published; call for current rates)
- Veterans receive 25% off the daily rate
- Quiet hours: 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM

## Location

Country Horizon RV Park is located in Ripley, Oklahoma, NOT inside Cushing,
Oklahoma. It sits at the intersection of Oklahoma Highway 33 and Highway 108,
approximately 7 miles (10-15 minutes) from Cushing, OK, a major U.S. oil
pipeline hub. It is also a short drive from Stillwater, OK (home of Oklahoma
State University) and neighboring Perkins, OK.

## Contact

- Call or text: 918-399-9423
- Email: chrvpark@gmail.com
- Directions: https://www.google.com/maps/dir/?api=1&destination=9212+W+Main+St,+Ripley,+OK+74062
